title: Traditional British Trifle
description: A classic English dessert made with layers of sponge cake, fruit, custard, and whipped cream.
instructions: Cut the sponge cake into 1-inch pieces.
In a large bowl, whip the heavy whipping cream until stiff peaks form.
In a separate bowl, mix the mascarpone cheese with a little sugar and vanilla extract.
In a large serving dish, create a layer of sponge cake pieces.
Top the cake with a layer of mixed berries.
Repeat the layers two more times, ending with a layer of whipped cream.
Chill the trifle in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes before serving.
